chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D –2839 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________________ Order with signature of Judge 1. For order on CMA No.3688 of 2021 (U/A) 2. For order on CMA No.3689 of 2021 (Contempt) Dated: 03.02.2021 Mr. Ali Asadullah Bullo, advocate for the petitioners. --------- 1. Granted. 2. It is contended inter-alia that this Court vide order dated 19.01.2021 dismissed the applications under Section 12 CPC and for stay respectively with strong observation against the alleged contemnors/official respondents. Learned counsel asserted that the alleged contemnors have deliberately and intentionally defeated the orders passed by this Court in the aforesaid proceedings by issuing the fresh notification dated 29.01.2021 whereby the Headmasters/Headmistresses/beneficiaries have been retained for a further period of six months or earlier when the recommendation for recruitment of regular Headmaster/Headmistress is received from the Sindh Public Service Commission. Per learned counsel, this is a clear defiance of the judgment dated 21.05.2019 and orders dated 16.11.2020, 04.11.2020, 12.01.2021 & 19.01.2021 passed by this Court. He prayed for initiation of contempt proceedings against the alleged contemnors. Be that as it may, let at the first instance comments be called from the alleged contemnors No.2 & 3 to ascertain as to whether they have flouted the orders passed by this Court or otherwise. To be listed after two weeks. ________________ J U D G E _______________ J U D G E
